text:
Once upon a time, there was a curious squirrel named Silvia.

Every day she would travel through the forests collecting acorns. One day, while gathering acorns, she came across a mystical oak tree with glowing eyes.

She whispered to it, "Oh wise tree, what treasures lurk within?"

The tree giggled, "Oh dear, I have one treasure!"

What treasure? thought Silvia eagerly.

The tree whispered mysteriously, "I have a map leading to the Acorn Dream Weaver. Would you like a map?

All her life Silvia wished she could fly through the branches like a wizard, visiting enchanted lands.

"Yes! Yes!" she exclaimed.

The tree waved its leaves, granting access to its magic. She collected some magic dust and flew off on a magical broomstick.

Upon reaching a land called Dreamweaver’s Hollow she met a kindly old owl.

"I’ll give you the map if you tell me what dream you want me to weave," she crooned
